craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Welcome to Budget Suites of America, North Phoenix Arizona where we invite you to make one of our apartments your home for a week, a month or beyond! We are conveniently located near the intersection of the I-17 and the 101 Loop for easy access to any destination from your new home. Come and relax in your new apartment whether you’re a family relocating to a new city, business traveler, and vacationer, student, enjoying the winter in the land of sunshine or just making a new beginning in the great city of Phoenix. The choice is easy when you have such a fantastic selection of nearby shopping to choose from, the many styles of dining options, movie theaters, grocery and coffee shops, hospital, bus stops and all within a short walking distance. Our apartments are spacious, comfortable and equally affordable for any budget. Our apartments boast a separate bedroom, are fully furnished and have full sized kitchen appliances unlike many of our weekly competitors! Budget Suites has the conveniences of a hotel, with all the comforts of home. Welcome home neighbor! At Budget Suites of America North Phoenix, you will find valuable service and amenities at a price you can value just as much. Fully Furnished Apartments All Utilities Paid Cox Cable TV with HBO & ESPN Postal Delivery and Pick Up Full Sized Kitchen Appliances Office Open 7 Days a Week Elevators to All Buildings Pet Friendly with Deposit Plenty of Covered and Uncovered Parking Beautiful Grounds and Landscaping Beautiful Pools and Spa Pet Walking Area with Supplied Pet Waste Stations On-Site Laundry Facilities with ALL BRAND NEW MACHINES!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! On-Site Maintenance Staff On-Site Management Staff Courtesy Patrol Apartments have varying upgrades, Deluxe Flooring, Flat Screen TV, Microwave and Optional WIFI Manager Special introductory base rate starts as low as $259 + (tax), for the first 5 weeks then the weekly rate Adjusts to $279 base rate moving forward, deposit is required at check-in with first payment. No credit check is required. Two-week minimum stay required. Manager Specials subject to availability, first come first served. No application fees. No lease. Move in on the same day! Come live awhile with your neighbor Budget Suites of America.
